mapper.select: select id from tbl_comment where id = #{commentId} and deleted_datetime is null
select id, member_id, target_type, target_id, parent_id, content, is_pinned, like_count, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_comment where id = #{commentId} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.update: update tbl_comment set like_count = coalesce(like_count, 0) + 1, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{commentId} and deleted_datetime is null
update tbl_comment set like_count = greatest(coalesce(like_count, 0) - 1, 0), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{commentId} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.select: select coalesce(like_count, 0) from tbl_comment where id = #{commentId} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.update: update tbl_comment set content = #{content}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{commentId} and deleted_datetime is null
update tbl_comment set deleted_datetime = now(), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{commentId} and deleted_datetime is null
